summary: Frontend testing completed for iMos mobile app (Expo/React Native web build). All 4 features tested successfully: Login error message display, Sign Up button styling, Contacts refresh button, and valid login flow.

login_error_message.description: Error message 'Invalid email or password' displays correctly with red alert-circle icon when invalid credentials are entered

signup_button_styling.description: Sign Up button is full-width (1872px), height 57px with blue (#007AFF) border at the bottom of login page

contacts_refresh_button.description: Refresh button (circular refresh icon) is visible in Contacts page header (web-only) and triggers contact reload when clicked

valid_login_flow.description: Login with forestward@gmail.com successfully redirects to /more page (admin role redirect behavior)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 requested features are working correctly. Login page shows error message with red icon for invalid credentials. Sign Up button has larger size with blue border. Contacts page has refresh button in header (web-only). Valid login redirects admin users to /more page.
